mapper.select: select id,name,user_account as userAccount,password_hash as passwordHash,user_avatar as userAvatar,user_profile as userProfile,user_role as userRole,created_at as createdAt,updated_at as updatedAt from user where id=#{id} and deleted_at is null

select id,name,user_account as userAccount,password_hash as passwordHash,user_avatar as userAvatar,user_profile as userProfile,user_role as userRole,created_at as createdAt,updated_at as updatedAt from user where user_account=#{account} and deleted_at is null limit 1
select count(*) from user where user_account=#{account}
mapper.update: update user set name=#{name},password_hash=#{passwordHash},user_avatar=#{avatar},user_profile=#{profile},user_role=#{role},deleted_at=null,updated_at=now() where user_account=#{account} limit 1

UPDATE user name=#{userName},name=#{name},user_avatar=#{userAvatar},user_avatar=#{avatar},user_profile=#{userProfile},user_profile=#{profile},user_role=#{userRole},user_role=#{role},updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
update user set deleted_at=now(),updated_at=now() where id=#{id} and deleted_at is null
mapper.select: select id,name,user_account as userAccount,user_avatar as userAvatar,user_profile as userProfile,user_role as userRole,created_at as createdAt,updated_at as updatedAt from user where deleted_at is null and name like concat('%',#{name},'%') and user_account like concat('%',#{account},'%') order by id desc limit #{offset},#{size}
select count(*) from user where deleted_at is null and name like concat('%',#{name},'%') and user_account like concat('%',#{account},'%')
